briefdescription.para: Initialize the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance to initialize.
ConfigPtr
Pointer to the configuration structure.
EffectiveAddr
Base address of the hardware instance.
This function initializes an XV_mix instance using the provided configuration structure and base address. It sets up the instance configuration, assigns the base address, and marks the instance as ready.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.

briefdescription.para: Starts the XV_mix hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates the operation of the XV_mix hardware by setting the 'start' bit in the control register. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the hardware is ready. The function preserves the auto-restart bit (bit 7) in the control register and sets the 'ap_start' bit (bit 0) to begin processing.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_mix instance to be started.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_mix hardware core has completed its current operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_mix instance to determine if the hardware operation is done. It asserts that the instance pointer is valid and that the core is ready before accessing the register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_mix hardware core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_mix instance to determine if the hardware is currently idle. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_mix hardware core is ready to accept new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_mix instance to determine if the core is ready for the next operation. It asserts that the instance pointer is valid and that the instance is marked as ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready for new input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enables the auto-restart feature of the XV_mix hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the appropriate control register bit to allow the hardware core to automatically restart its operation after completing a task, without requiring software intervention.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Disable the auto-restart feature of the XV_mix hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart mechanism by writing 0 to the AP_CTRL register of the hardware. When auto-restart is disabled, the core will not automatically restart processing after completing a task.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Sets the flush bit in the control register of the XV_mix hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the control register, sets the flush bit, and writes the updated value back to the register. The flush bit is typically used to trigger a hardware flush operation, ensuring that any pending data is processed.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware instance is ready before performing the operation.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the flush done status from the XV_mix hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the FLUSH status bit from the AP_CTRL register of the XV_mix hardware core to determine if the flush operation has completed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the FLUSH status bit (non-zero if flush is done, zero otherwise).
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register width for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the XV_mix instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The width value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_WIDTH hardware register for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_WIDTH register from the hardware using the base address specified in the instance's configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_WIDTH register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the 'height' parameter of the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified 'Data' value to the HWREG_HEIGHT register of the XV_mix hardware. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The value to be written to the HWREG_HEIGHT register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_HEIGHT hardware register from the XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_HEIGHT register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the video format in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified video format data to the hardware register associated with the video format configuration of the XV_mix core.

parameterdescription.para: The video format data to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current hardware register value for the video format from the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).
The value of the HWREG_VIDEO_FORMAT register. Preconditions:
InstancePtr must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_mix structure.
The hardware must be ready for register access.

briefdescription.para: Sets the background Y (luminance) or R (red) value in the hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified value to the background Y/R register of the XV_mix hardware instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is valid and that the hardware is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the background Y/R register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the background Y (luminance) register from the hardware.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The current value of the background Y (R) hardware register. This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready before reading the register value.

briefdescription.para: Sets the background U (Cb) or G (Green) component hardware register for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the hardware register responsible for the background U (Cb) or G (Green) color component in the video mixer hardware.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the background U/G hardware register.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg background U/G register from the XV_mix hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the background U (chroma) or G (green) register from the hardware register space of the XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWReg background U/G register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready before accessing the register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the background vertical B (blue) hardware register for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the HWREG_BACKGROUND_V_B register of the XV_mix hardware. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The value to write to the background V_B register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg background V_B register from the XV_mix hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the background V_B hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register read.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWReg background V_B register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for layer enable in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the HWREG_LAYERENABLE register of the XV_mix hardware, enabling or disabling layers as specified by the data.

parameterdescription.para: Value to write to the HWREG_LAYERENABLE register.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register that controls layer enablement for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_LAYERENABLE register from the hardware to determine which layers are currently enabled in the video mixer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERENABLE register, indicating the enabled layers as a bitmask.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the alpha value for layer 0 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified alpha value to the hardware register controlling the transparency (alpha) of layer 0 in the video mixer.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The alpha value to set for layer 0.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the alpha blending parameter of layer 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_LAYERALPHA_0 register from the hardware, which controls the alpha (transparency) setting for layer 0 in the video mixer.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The current value of the HWREG_LAYERALPHA_0 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the start X position of layer 0 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_LAYERSTARTX_0 register, which controls the horizontal start position of layer 0 in the video mixer hardware.

parameterdescription.para: The value to be written to the HWREG_LAYERSTARTX_0 register.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg_layerStartX_0 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The value read from the HWReg_layerStartX_0 register. Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Sets the starting Y coordinate for layer 0 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The Y coordinate value to set for layer 0.
This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready before writing the specified Y coordinate value to the appropriate hardware register for layer 0.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg_layerStartY_0 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value from the HWReg_layerStartY_0 register, which typically represents the starting Y coordinate for layer 0 in the video mixer hardware.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWReg_layerStartY_0 register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the width of layer 0 in the hardware register for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with layer 0 of the video mixer. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The width value to be set for layer 0.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the width of layer 0 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.
The value of the HWREG_LAYERWIDTH_0 register. Preconditions:
InstancePtr must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_mix structure.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.
This function reads the width configuration of layer 0 from the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for layer stride 0 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the hardware register responsible for configuring the stride of layer 0. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The value to be written to the layer stride 0 register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_LAYERSTRIDE_0 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the layer stride register (layer 0) from the hardware, which is used to determine the memory stride for the first layer in the video mixer.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The current value of the HWREG_LAYERSTRIDE_0 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the height of layer 0 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register associated with layer 0 of the XV_mix instance. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The height value to set for layer 0.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register for layer height 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_LAYERHEIGHT_0 register from the hardware associated with the given XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
Instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERHEIGHT_0 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the scale factor of layer 0 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified scale factor value to the hardware register corresponding to layer 0. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The scale factor value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the scale factor of layer 0 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The value of the HWREG_LAYERSCALEFACTOR_0 register. This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value from the corresponding hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the video format for layer 0 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The video format value to be written to the hardware register.
This function asserts that the instance pointer is valid and that the hardware is ready before writing the specified video format value to the corresponding hardware register for layer 0.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_0 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
Must be initialized and ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_0 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the alpha value for layer 1 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified alpha value to the hardware register controlling the transparency (alpha) of layer 1 in the video mixer.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The alpha value to set for layer 1.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register for layer alpha 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the HWREG_LAYERALPHA_1 register from the XV_mix hardware instance specified by InstancePtr.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance. It must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value of the HWREG_LAYERALPHA_1 register.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the start X coordinate for layer 1 in the XV_mix hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified value to the hardware register responsible for the starting X position of layer 1 in the video mixer instance.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The X coordinate value to set for layer 1.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg_layerStartX_1 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The current value of the HWReg_layerStartX_1 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the starting Y coordinate for layer 1 in the hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified Y coordinate value to the hardware register associated with layer 1's start Y position. It first asserts that the provided XV_mix instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for use.

parameterdescription.para: The Y coordinate value to set for layer 1.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg_layerStartY_1 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWReg_layerStartY_1 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the width of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with layer 1. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The width value to be set for layer 1.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register for layer width 1.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_mix instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERWIDTH_1 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the layer stride of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified stride value to the hardware register associated with layer 1. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The stride value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_LAYERSTRIDE_1 hardware register for the specified XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The current value of the HWREG_LAYERSTRIDE_1 register. This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value from the HWREG_LAYERSTRIDE_1 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the height of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register associated with layer 1. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The height value to be written to the hardware register for layer 1.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register corresponding to the height of layer 1.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
The instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWREG_LAYERHEIGHT_1 hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the scale factor of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified scale factor value to the hardware register associated with layer 1 scaling in the XV_mix hardware. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The scale factor value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the scale factor of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Must not be NULL.
Instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERSCALEFACTOR_1 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the video format of layer 1 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the hardware register that controls the video format for layer 1 of the video mixer. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The value to be written to the layer video format register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the video format of layer 1.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The value of the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_1 register. This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before reading the register value.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the Layer 1 Buffer 1 vertical hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit value to the hardware register associated with Layer 1 Buffer 1's vertical parameter. The value is split into two 32-bit parts and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
64-bit value to be written to the hardware register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The XV_mix instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the Layer 1 Buffer 1 vertical register from the hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware, combines them into a 64-bit value, and returns the result. It asserts that the provided XV_mix instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit value read from the Layer 1 Buffer 1 vertical register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the hardware register for Layer 1 Buffer 2 Vertical parameter.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit value to the hardware register associated with Layer 1 Buffer 2 Vertical (HWREG_LAYER1_BUF2_V) in the XV_mix instance. The value is split into two 32-bit writes to accommodate the register width.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register writes.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the HWREG_LAYER1_BUF2_V hardware register from the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two consecutive 32-bit registers and combines them to form a 64-bit value.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit value read from the HWREG_LAYER1_BUF2_V register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for Layer 1 Buffer 3 virtual address.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit address value to the hardware register associated with Layer 1 Buffer 3. The address is split into two 32-bit values and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
64-bit address value to be written to the register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the hardware register for layer1 buffer 3 (V) from the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware: the lower 32 bits from XV_MIX_CTRL_ADDR_HWREG_LAYER1_BUF3_V_DATA and the upper 32 bits from XV_MIX_CTRL_ADDR_HWREG_LAYER3_BUF1_V_DATA + 4. The two values are combined to form a 64-bit result.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit value read from the hardware register.
The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the alpha value for layer 2 in the XV_mix hardware register.

Preconditions:

InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERALPHA_2 register.

Must not be NULL.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_LAYERSTARTX_2 register.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.

The instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWReg_layerStartY_2 register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with layer 2 of the video mixer. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

Pointer to the XV_mix instance.

The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified scale factor value to the hardware register associated with layer 2 scaling in the XV_mix hardware. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The scale factor value to be written to the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register corresponding to the scale factor for layer 2 in the XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the video format of layer 2 in the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
The value to write to the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_2 register.
This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then writes the specified data to the corresponding hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the video format of layer 2.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_2 register from the hardware associated with the specified XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance. It must be a valid pointer and the instance must be ready.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value of the HWREG_LAYERVIDEOFORMAT_2 register.
None.

briefdescription.para: Sets the buffer address for layer 2 (buffer 1) in the hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit address (Data) to the hardware register associated with layer 2 buffer 1. The address is split into two 32-bit values and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
Data
64-bit buffer address to be set in the hardware register.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the HWREG_LAYER2_BUF1_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware, combines them into a 64-bit value, and returns the result. It asserts that the provided XV_mix instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operations.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit value read from the HWREG_LAYER2_BUF1_V register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the 64-bit value of the HWReg_layer2_buf2_V hardware register from the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads two 32-bit registers from the hardware (lower and upper parts) and combines them into a single 64-bit value. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware registers.

simplesect.para: 64-bit value read from the HWReg_layer2_buf2_V register.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read on success, or 0 if the read would exceed register bounds.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the base address of the Logo A V hardware register for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It then returns the calculated base address for the Logo A V hardware register by adding the configured base address to the register offset.

simplesect.para: The base address of the Logo A V hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the high address of the HWREG_LOGOA_V register for the given XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for use. It then calculates and returns the high address of the HWREG_LOGOA_V register by adding the base address from the instance configuration to the register offset.

simplesect.para: The high address of the HWREG_LOGOA_V register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the total number of bytes for the logoA vertical hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function calculates the total byte size of the logoA vertical hardware register by subtracting the base address from the high address and adding one.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_mix instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.

simplesect.para: The total number of bytes for the logoA vertical hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the bit width of the hardware register for the LogoA vertical position (V).

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_mix instance.
The bit width of the HWREG_LOGOA_V register. This function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before returning the bit width constant for the LogoA_V hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the vertical depth of Logo A.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_mix instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.

simplesect.para: The hardware register value representing the vertical depth of Logo A.

briefdescription.para: Writes a sequence of words to the HWReg_logoA_V hardware register of the XV_mix instance.

parameterdescription.para: Offset (in words) from the base address of the HWReg_logoA_V register.
Pointer to the array of data words to be written.

simplesect.para: The number of words written on success, or 0 if the write operation exceeds the register's address range.
This function assumes that the hardware instance is ready and that the data pointer is valid.

briefdescription.para: Reads a specified number of 32-bit words from the HWReg_logoA_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads 'length' 32-bit words starting from the given 'offset' within the HWReg_logoA_V register space and stores them into the provided 'data' buffer. It ensures that the read operation does not exceed the register's address range.

parameterdescription.para: Offset (in words) from the base address of HWReg_logoA_V to start reading.
Pointer to the buffer where the read words will be stored.

simplesect.para: Number of words read on success, or 0 if the requested range is out of bounds.

briefdescription.para: Writes a sequence of bytes to the HWReg_logoA_V register of the XV_mix hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a specified number of bytes from the provided data buffer to the HWReg_logoA_V register, starting at the given offset. It ensures that the write operation does not exceed the register's address range.

parameterdescription.para: Offset in bytes from the base address of HWReg_logoA_V where writing starts.
Pointer to the buffer containing the data to write.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written on success, or 0 if the operation would exceed the register's range.

briefdescription.para: Reads a specified number of bytes from the HWREG_LOGOA_V hardware register.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads 'length' bytes from the hardware register region starting at 'offset' and stores them into the buffer pointed to by 'data'. It ensures that the read operation does not exceed the bounds of the hardware register region.

parameterdescription.para: Offset from the base address of the HWREG_LOGOA_V register region.
Pointer to the buffer where the read bytes will be stored.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read on success, or 0 if the requested range is out of bounds.

briefdescription.para: Enables the global interrupt for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit in the control register of the XV_mix hardware core, allowing interrupts to be generated.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Disables the global interrupt for the XV_mix hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the global interrupt enable bit in the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register, effectively disabling all interrupts for the XV_mix hardware. The instance pointer must be valid and the hardware must be ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupts for the XV_mix hardware module.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the bits specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) of the XV_mix instance. It first reads the current value of the IER, then sets the bits corresponding to Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given XV_mix instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits corresponding to the Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Clears the specified interrupt(s) for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the given interrupt mask to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to clear the corresponding interrupt(s) for the XV_mix hardware instance.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask specifying which interrupt(s) to clear.

simplesect.para: The XV_mix instance must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the current value of the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) for the specified XV_mix hardware instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_mix instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt status register value for the XV_mix instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the current value of the interrupt status register (ISR) for the specified XV_mix hardware instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt status register.
